title: PVP boss PACK
description: Basic pvp pack, suitable for all PVP modes (UHC, POTs, CPVP, etc.)
body:
This Resource Pack is Pretty Simple, But it Will Help You Get Better at Any Kind of PVP!
![x128 and x64 pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b61068cbff19700dadd29372b003b1d04874b58.png)

This pack will improve your eyesight during CPVP, help you see more during UHC drains and just look better than regular textures that REALLY interfere during pvp
![x128 and x64 pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26f01d70b0cfb05cb611af320be84e3349160cef.png)
PVP is an important aspect of Minecraft, and this pack will help you master it!

Or... if you dont like x128 armour that i made u can download pack without it, this pack should only help you in PVP and not change all the textures of the game, the x128 armour version only for fun.

contains:
- No Fire
- No Explosion Particles
- No Totem Pop Particles
- No Particles That Interfere With Your Vision
- Custom Tools and Armour
